subject: Update CDS image version for elalto to 0.6.5
commit_message:
Update CDS image version for elalto to 0.6.5

Issue-ID: OOM-2336
Change-Id: Iea0b8cf52d79cb3c755e06822ce3a833fcec3e2f
Signed-off-by: Marek Szwalkiewicz <marek.szwalkiewicz@external.t-mobile.pl>
